troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / Our Father Ephraim, pray to Christ God to save our souls!

kontakion.text: Ever anticipating the hour of Judgment, / you lamented bitterly, venerable Ephraim. / Through your deeds you were a teacher by example; / therefore, universal Father, you rouse the slothful to repentance.

saints.name: Venerable Theodosius, Abbot of Totma, Vologda

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Theodosius, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

saints.name: Venerable Ephraim the Wonderworker, Abbot of Novy Torg

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Ephraim, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

saints.name: Saint Ephraim, Bishop of Pereyaslavl, Kiev Caves, Far Caves

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Ephraim, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
O Hierarch Ephraim, divine thunder, spiritual trumpet, /   planter of faith and pruner of heresies, great favorite of the Trinity, /   while standing with the Angels before God,  /  pray unceasingly for us all.

saints.name: Venerable Palladius the Hermit, of Antioch

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Palladius, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

saints.name: Saint Isaac the Syrian, Bishop of Nineveh

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Isaac, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
O Hierarch Isaac, divine thunder, spiritual trumpet, /   planter of faith and pruner of heresies, great favorite of the Trinity, /   while standing with the Angels before God,  /  pray unceasingly for us all.
